'''sadhuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mibefradil|mibefradil]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-dh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mibefradil|mibefradil]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sadhuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sædhiyith|sædhiyith]] || [[word:sædhiyij|sædhiyij]] || [[word:sædhiyish|sædhiyish]] || [[word:sædhiyi|sædhiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sadhudhuyuth|sadhudhuyuth]] || [[word:sadhudhuyuj|sadhudhuyuj]] || [[word:sadhudhuyush|sadhudhuyush]] || [[word:sadhudhuyu|sadhudhuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sadhuyuth|sadhuyuth]] || [[word:sadhuyuj|sadhuyuj]] || [[word:sadhuyush|sadhuyush]] || [[word:sadhuyu|sadhuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sadhufyufth|sadhufyufth]] || [[word:sadhufyufj|sadhufyufj]] || [[word:sadhufyufsh|sadhufyufsh]] || [[word:sadhufyuf|sadhufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sadhuyuthu|sadhuyuthu]] || [[word:sadhuyuju|sadhuyuju]] || [[word:sadhuyushu|sadhuyushu]] || [[word:sadhuyuku|sadhuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sadhuyuth|sadhuyuth]] || [[word:sadhuyuj|sadhuyuj]] || [[word:sadhuyush|sadhuyush]] || [[word:sadhuyu|sadhuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sadhuyuthul|sadhuyuthul]] || [[word:sadhuyujul|sadhuyujul]] || [[word:sadhuyushul|sadhuyushul]] || [[word:sadhuyukul|sadhuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sadhuyuuthuthu|sadhuyuuthuthu]] || [[word:sadhuyuujuju|sadhuyuujuju]] || [[word:sadhuyuushushu|sadhuyuushushu]] || [[word:sadhuyuuku|sadhuyuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sadhuyuthun|sadhuyuthun]] || [[word:sadhuyujun|sadhuyujun]] || [[word:sadhuyushun|sadhuyushun]] || [[word:sadhuyukun|sadhuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sadhuyuthuoro|sadhuyuthuoro]] || [[word:sadhuyujuoro|sadhuyujuoro]] || [[word:sadhuyushuoro|sadhuyushuoro]] || [[word:sadhuyukuoro|sadhuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|34122d8}}
